devnotes.summary: Main class for the root growth model. Represents the root growth model in the HUME system and subclasses TPlantRelatedSubMod. Provides properties and methods for root growth and root length density calculations and includes a coupled soil water model and a list of texture effects.
List of texture effects initialized at component creation.
True if root growth starts only after emergence.
Set the name for root length variables
devnotes.param: The name to be set additionally to the depth increment string

devnotes.summary: Calculates average root length density between two depths.
devnotes.returns: Average root length density between z1 and z2.

devnotes.summary: Set the plant model for this module
devnotes.param: The new plant model to be set
devnotes.remarks: This method sets the plant model for the module and updates the search parameters for fine root and root growth variables.

devnotes.summary: Option defining the depth growth model.
Root length density in the first 15 cm.
Effective root length density in the first 30 cm, i.e., after subtracting dead or inactive roots.
Root matrix storing age-classed root length per soil compartment.
Relative rooting depth increase in optional exponential phase [cm.cm-1.Cd-1].
Root growth per degree-day in the linear phase.
Daily DM growth rate of fine roots [g/m2/d].
Option for texture effects on root growth.
If true, root growth does not start before emergence.
